zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela Beauchamp於大約1230年出生時，她的父親William de Beauchamp46歲，母親Ida Longespée23歲。她於1254年與Baldwin Le Wak or Wake在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年1月10日之前在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela Beauchamp于大约1230年出生时，她的父亲William de Beauchamp46岁，母亲Ida Longespée23岁。她于1254年与Baldwin Le Wak or Wake在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年1月10日之前在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: of uncertain derivation. It is thought in part to be a combination of elements from   Elizabeth   and   Mary ;  in part a feminine equivalent of   Elmer .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela Beauchamp was born about 1230, her father, William de Beauchamp, was 46 and her mother, Ida Longespée, was 23. She married Baldwin Le Wak or Wake in 1254, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died before 10 January 1267, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela Beauchamp est née environ 1230, son père, William de Beauchamp, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ida Longespée, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Baldwin Le Wak or Wake en 1254, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 10 janvier 1267, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela Beauchamp um 1230 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Beauchamp 46 und ihre Mutter Ida Longespée 23. Sie hat 1254 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England Baldwin Le Wak or Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 10. Januar 1267 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Beauchamp è nata il circa 1230, sua padre, William de Beauchamp, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Ida Longespée, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Baldwin Le Wak or Wake nel 1254, nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 10 gennaio 1267, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela Beauchampが約1230年に生まれた時，父William de Beauchampは46歳，母Ida Longespéeは23歳であった。1254年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスでBaldwin Le Wak or Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年1月10日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1230년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Beauchamp(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida Longespée(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1254년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 Baldwin Le Wak or Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 1월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

mn.Abt 1230–Bef 10 January 1267: ойролцоогоор 1230 он–1267 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 10–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1230, seu pai, William de Beauchamp, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ida Longespée, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Baldwin Le Wak or Wake em 1254, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 10 de janeiro de 1267, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela Beauchamp родилась около 1230 г., её отцу по имени William de Beauchamp было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida Longespée, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baldwin Le Wak or Wake в 1254 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 10 январь 1267 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия.

sm.Abt 1230–Bef 10 January 1267: e tusa o le 1230–a'e le'I oo le 10 Ianuari 1267

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1230, su papá, William de Beauchamp, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ida Longespée, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Baldwin Le Wak or Wake en 1254, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 10 de enero de 1267, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Essex, Inglaterra.
